{!LoopEvents.Full_Details__c}

value.stringValue:
Events
Link Details Times & Location RSVP

<table style="width:100%; border: 1px solid #F5F5F5;border-collapse: collapse;"> <th colspan="3" style="padding: 10px;border: 1px solid #F5F5F5;;border-collapse: collapse;text-align:center;vertical-align: middle;background-color:#E0F7FD;color:#6ABBD0;font-size:22pt;" >Ready to Lend</th></tr> <tr> <th style="border: 1px solid #F5F5F5;width:20%;text-align:left;padding: 10px;color: #A4A4A4;">Link</th> <th style="border: 1px solid #F5F5F5;text-align:left;color: #A4A4A4;padding: 10px;">Details</th> <th style="border: 1px solid #F5F5F5;text-align: center;width:15%;color: #A4A4A4;">Borrow</th></tr>
